name: code-process-logger
description: VS Code extension for logging coding process data in ProgSnap2 format — tracks edits, pauses, and productive struggle.

codeProcessLogger.outputDir.description: Directory to save ProgSnap2 log files. Defaults to workspace/.code-process-logs

codeProcessLogger.shortPauseThreshold.description: Milliseconds of inactivity to group edits into one chunk

codeProcessLogger.midPauseThreshold.description: Milliseconds of inactivity before enabling autocomplete

codeProcessLogger.longPauseThreshold.description: Milliseconds of inactivity before asking pause reason

codeProcessLogger.serverUrl.description: URL of the backend server for LLM autocomplete and log collection

codeProcessLogger.autoStart.description: Automatically start logging when a workspace is opened
